回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 進修部學士班	113學年度第2學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 綠色產業發展 (Green Industry Development)	開課班級 : 進企管四(軍)	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 蔡亮	必選修 : 選修	 	 


1.教學目標
During this class, you will: (1)Introduce the concept of Inclusive and Sustainable Industrial Development and its relation with environmental matters. (2)Reflect on the necessary parameters of governance systems (strategies, policies, laws and regulations) for green industrial development. Achieving low carbon and efficient material use paths for industrial development is a key aspect. (3)Outline practical feasibility of technical requirements and policy measures for promoting green industry. (4)Discuss how enterprises can successfully tackle key challenges that prevent them from commercializing Green Industry-related products and services. (5)Delineate the essential institutional platforms for promoting “Green Industry”. Apart from promoting resource efficient and cleaner production, such institutions should offer counsel on the development and deployment of economically viable, socially appropriate and environmentally sustainable green technologies. (6)Enable participants to construct and make use of Green Industry strategies that help meet specific future environmental goals and targets.  


2.教學綱要
PART I. INTRODUCTION TO GREEN INDUSTRIES
PART II. RESEARCH METHODOLOGIES FOR GREEN INDUSTRIES
PART III. POLICIES FOR SUPPORTING GREEN INDUSTRY
PART IV. CASE STUDYING
PART V. SYNTHESIS: SUSTAINABLE FUTURE

6.成績評定及課堂要求
Final evaluations will reflect the quality of class participation and weekly memos (30%), an exam (30%), project work (30%), and students’ peer evaluations (10%). We will assess the quality of students’ work based on its substance (depth, originality) and presentation (clarity, effectiveness). 
Attendance at class and out-of-class team meetings is mandatory. In addition to preparing a final deliverable, student teams will make in-class presentations and a final presentation to the enterprise partner (if possible).
